title: Class or function defined without namespace or module prefix
description: A class or function is defined in the global namespace with a name that does not start with the module name, risking collision with core CMSMS, other modules, or PHP built-ins.
explanation: CMSMS modules share a global PHP namespace. Defining a class or function without a namespace or module name prefix will cause fatal errors if another module uses the same name. Use PHP namespaces or prefix all names with the module name.
fix: Add a namespace declaration (e.g. namespace MyModule;) or prefix the class/function name with the module name.
